title: The Search Turns Toward Drum
description: On pages 16–18, the search turns toward drum as the crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them.
scene: The Search Turns Toward Drum. The crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's... it's a cyclone!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's Huuge!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... that direction is...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's exactly where we were headed just until a moment ago...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If we had sailed straight, we'd have crashed right into it by now!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Talk about a close call!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Incredible... a cyclone on the grand line's said to be impossible to predict...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This girl isn't just predicting the weather,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Based on weather forecast theories...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's almost as if she's directly feeling the minute happenings of the climate itself...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've never seen such a Navigator...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, let's hurry it up, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We'll keep heading south to find a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ignoring the needle pointing to Alabasta, the ship is now on the lookout for a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: After 1 day...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Vivi, what do we do!? Nami's fever isn't going down!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sanji! Karoo! You have to be quiet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can you see a doctor from up there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course not, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UHhh, guys... do you think a person could...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stand on top of an ocean...?

summary: This part centers on the search turns toward drum, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
